Provenance.drafts: round 1: 4 candidates (seed+0..+3) -- c1 was a clean full-bleed torchlit tunnel scene but carried a small signature-like corner mark. round 2 escalation: 4 more candidates (seed+4..+7) with negative hardened against text/signature/corner-text/concept-sheet/grid-layout; curated per art/pipeline/README.md
Provenance.paintoverNote: round 1 c1 (seed+1) was viable but had a small signature-like mark in one corner; escalated for a mark-free alternative. round 2 c2 (seed+6, offset+2 within the round) -- full-bleed torchlit cave-tunnel interior, receding rock-wall depth with both ember-orange torchlight and arcane-violet glow (matches the house palette's dual-hue clause), no visible text/signature. round 1 c0/round 2 c0 were multi-panel concept grids; round 1 c3 was an explicitly tiled/seamless pattern.
Provenance.aiDisclosure: AI-generated (SDXL base 1.0) diffuse; cutout.py NOT run (AssetKind.Backdrop fills the whole plane -- BiRefNet's salient-object segmentation would discard ~97% of the scene as 'background', per the U6 precedent) -- format-converted straight to opaque RGBA; no normal map (flat far plane per AssetSpec.NormalMap=false).
